title: Paegun Hwasang Chorok: Buddhist Parables
source: Oldest Korean printed book with movable metal type
description: One of the earliest books printed with movable metal type — a collection of Buddhist parables and teachings.
introduction: One of the earliest books printed with movable metal type — a collection of Buddhist parables and teachings.

translation.text: A monk asked: 'What is the Buddha?' The master replied: 'Three pounds of flax.' The monk did not understand. But understanding is not found in words.
